problem.title: Longest Common Prefix
problem.description: Write a function to find the longest common prefix string amongst an array of strings.
assumptions: Return empty string if no common prefix.

example.explanation: All strings start with 'fl'. 'flo' is not common to 'flight'.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Horizontal Scanning
solutions.description: Start with the first string as the candidate prefix, then iteratively trim it from the right until it is a prefix of every subsequent string. The trimming loop ensures correctness while the outer loop advances through all strings, giving O(S) total character comparisons where S is the sum of all string lengths.
